case_title: RINALDI VINCENZO et al VS PAUL LEONARD B IND DBA NORTHWEST PLUS INDUSTRIES et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RINALDI VINCENZO RINALDI RAFFAELLA AS TO DEFENDANT PAUL LEONARD B IND DBA NORTHWEST PLUS INDUSTRIES AMWEST SURETY INSURANCE COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-1991 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 00

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RINALDI VINCENZO RINALDI RAFFAELLA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAUL LEONARD B IND DBA NORTHWEST PLUS INDUSTRIES $1,934.00 PRINCIPAL, $476.52 INTEREST, $13.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,423.52, RULING CONSIDERED THE FACT THAT THE KR'S LICENSE U SED TO ENTER THE K WAS HELD BY LEONARD PAUL IND. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
